info.title: Zipper Auth API
info.description: Authentication, OAuth, API keys, and partner/merchant onboarding endpoints exposed via the gateway.

tags.name: Partner Merchants
tags.description: Manage merchants onboarded by the authenticated partner

tags.name: Merchant API Keys
tags.description: Manage merchant API keys for OAuth2 client credentials authentication

get.description: Returns a paginated list of all merchants onboarded by the authenticated partner, including their business name, email, status, and onboarding origin.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Language preference for response content. Supported: en, he

post.description: Creates and onboards a new merchant under the authenticated partner. The merchant will receive an activation email to complete registration.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Language preference for response content. Supported: en, he

post.summary: Exchange client credentials for an access token
post.description: Issues a JWT access token in exchange for valid API client credentials using the client_credentials grant type. Credentials must be provided via HTTP Basic Authentication (Base64-encoded apiKey:apiSecret).

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Language preference for response content. Supported: en, he

get.description: Returns a summary of all API keys belonging to the authenticated merchant, including status and usage metadata.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Language preference for response content. Supported: en, he

403.description: Forbidden – requires MERCHANT role with PASSWORD auth

post.description: Generates a new API key pair (apiKey and apiSecret) for the authenticated merchant. The apiSecret is only returned once at creation time and cannot be retrieved later.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Language preference for response content. Supported: en, he

403.description: Forbidden – requires MERCHANT role with PASSWORD auth

get.description: Returns the onboarding status of a specific merchant, including account status, email verification state, and creation date. The merchant must belong to the authenticated partner.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Language preference for response content. Supported: en, he

403.description: Forbidden – merchant does not belong to this partner

get.description: Looks up a merchant by their email address within the authenticated partner's scope. Returns the merchant summary if found and belongs to this partner.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Language preference for response content. Supported: en, he

404.description: Merchant not found for this partner

delete.description: Permanently revokes the specified API key. The key will no longer be usable for authentication.

parameters.name: Accept-Language
parameters.description: Language preference for response content. Supported: en, he

403.description: Forbidden – requires MERCHANT role with PASSWORD auth

PartnerOnboardingResult.description: Result of a partner-initiated merchant onboarding, including generated API credentials

merchantId.description: Unique identifier of the newly onboarded merchant

apiKey.description: Generated API key for the merchant

apiSecret.description: Generated API secret for the merchant – only returned once at creation time

message.description: Human-readable status message about the onboarding result

ApiKeyCreatedResponse.description: Response returned when a new API key is created, including the secret shown only once

id.description: Unique identifier of the API key

apiKey.description: The API key value used as the client ID

apiSecret.description: The API secret – only returned once at creation time and cannot be retrieved later

label.description: Human-readable label for identifying this API key

scopes.description: Set of permission scopes granted to this API key

MerchantSummary.description: Summary view of a merchant including business info, status, and onboarding origin

businessName.description: Registered business name of the merchant

email.description: Email address associated with the merchant account

status.description: Current account status of the merchant

origin.description: How the merchant was onboarded (e.g. SELF, PARTNER)

partnerId.description: Identifier of the partner that onboarded this merchant, if any

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the merchant was created

MerchantOnboardingStatus.description: Current onboarding status of a merchant including verification state

status.description: Current account status of the merchant

emailVerified.description: Whether the merchant's email address has been verified

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the merchant was created

ApiKeySummary.description: Summary of an API key including status and usage metadata

id.description: Unique identifier of the API key

apiKeyPrefix.description: First few characters of the API key for identification

label.description: Human-readable label for identifying this API key

scopes.description: Set of permission scopes granted to this API key

status.description: Current status of the API key (e.g. ACTIVE, REVOKED)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the API key was created

lastUsedAt.description: Timestamp when the API key was last used for authentication
